Zhao Rong и¶ҷиһҚ
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Zhao Rong (и¶ҷиһҚ). Fought at Yiling, in the novel fights in two northern campaigns. Zhao Rong was affiliated with the Shu Kingdom.
